governance_integrity.rationale: No AI calls, no prompt surfaces, no topology mutation, no schema mutation, no readiness recomputation, no qualifier reinterpretation, no GEIOS leakage. Fail-closed behavior confirmed: governance_verdict FAIL unconditionally routes to BLOCKED. Q-04 absence notice mandatory and confirmed.

semantic_integrity.rationale: Normalization preserved at generation time (NORM-DET-01/02). Q-00..Q-04 correctly mapped across all three mapper layers. Blocked semantics (VIS-BLOCK-01/02) enforced. Diagnostic semantics (VIS-DIAG-01/02) enforced. Evidence linkage preserved. Propagation semantics (VIS-PROP-01/02, VIS-PRESS-01/02) enforced. Deterministic rendering confirmed.

rendering_integrity.rationale: Validation → adapter → container chain intact. All adapters are pure pass-through functions. No hidden computation. No dynamic interpretation. No narrative generation. No propagation inference. No semantic mutation. Input objects confirmed not mutated across all rendering paths.

executive_readiness.rationale: Rendering substrate is semantically and governance-complete. Inverted pyramid narrative, qualifier-aware surfaces, density orchestration, evidence-linked propagation, boardroom-grade vocabulary all operational. Design token application and cinematic rendering not yet realized — substrate is ready to receive them.
blockers: Cinematic rendering (motion semantics, reveal flows) pending

commercial_readiness.rationale: Structural commercial differentiation is present: evidence-linked propagation, qualifier-aware governance surfaces, deterministic trust semantics. Visual differentiation — the commercially visible layer for boardroom demonstration — requires experiential realization. Platform is demonstrable at substrate level.
blockers: Experiential realization layer required for commercial visual differentiation

experiential_readiness.rationale: All governance preconditions for experiential realization satisfied. Cinematic executive rendering, motion semantics, visual density orchestration, intelligence reveal flows, and investigation transitions are all authorized. Substrate is ready.

workspace_readiness.rationale: Workspace shell exploration authorized. Evidence drawer interactions authorized. Density switching authorized. Interactive topology and guided investigation require new governing contracts before activation. Live inference and prompt surfaces forbidden.
blockers: Interactive topology requires Phase-3 governance contract
Guided investigation requires governing contract before activation

regression_safety.rationale: 423/423 tests pass. All six suites pass in isolation. No regressions from any prior stream. Test suite coherence confirmed: validation (78), adapters (69), container (40), badge (75), narrative (65), propagation (96).

topology_safety.rationale: No topology write operations exist in Phase-2 component layer. Propagation chains are rendered from committed data. No live traversal. No dynamic inference. VIS-PROP-02 (no animation for flow) compliance confirmed — no animation implementations in Phase-2 components. TopologyPanel.js is GAUGE-era component, not Phase-2.

qualifier_safety.rationale: Q-00..Q-04 correctly mapped in QualifierChipAdapter, VisualSemanticMapper, NarrativeSemanticMapper, PropagationSemanticMapper. Q-04 absence notice confirmed mandatory. Q-01..Q-03 chips confirmed non-suppressible (VIS-QUAL-02). No path where qualifier can be hidden.

constraints: Experiential realization must not introduce animated propagation flow (VIS-PROP-02)
Qualifier chips must remain visible throughout all visual token application (VIS-QUAL-02)
Interactive topology requires new Phase-3 governance contract
No free-form AI or prompt surfaces in experiential realization
No live inference in any workspace evolution
